self_improvement.claim: Directive Workspace can keep the canonical truth anchor useful by resolving the two known historical architecture-to-runtime handoffs directly instead of crashing reports.
self_improvement.mechanism: This DEEP bounded result adds read-only legacy Runtime handoff focus paths to the shared state resolver.
self_improvement.baseline_observation: Before this DEEP case, the canonical report crashed on the two legacy `runtime/handoff/*.md` artifacts even though the workbench already treated them as readable historical handoffs.
self_improvement.expected_effect: Future report and composition work can inspect those historical Runtime handoffs directly without reconstructing their meaning by hand.

decision.rationale: The shared truth anchor should resolve the two known historical Runtime handoffs as read-only artifacts instead of crashing.
decision.runtime_threshold_check: yes - the mechanism is still valuable without a runtime surface, so Architecture should retain product-owned value
